title: Bread Reborn: Redefined
description: A reinterpretation of the 1.19.2 Bread Reborn mods with more bread!
body:
== CREDITS TO ORIGINAL MODS ==
_Bread Reborn_ by ducilan: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bread-reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bread-reborn)
_Bread reborn: reborn_ by YarikProgs: [https://modrinth.com/mod/bread-reborn-reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/bread-reborn-reborn)

This project has custom textures and effects for all breads, with four additional breads, two additional millstones, and the removal of the mill structure. All content for the mod was created by Warm_Wooly.

---

 

Bread Reborn: Redefined builds upon the 1.19.2 mods Bread Reborn and Bread reborn: reborn to make a carb-filled mod like no other! Mill various materials into flour, bake them into breads, and experiment with their effects.

Credit to [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) for an easy-to-learn and easy-to-use mod-making system! :D
Join the Discord [here](https://discord.com/invite/ASkVBubyzH) for future updates on my mods!
For more information, visit the [wiki](https://anotherpedia.com/#Bread%20Reborn:%20Redefined)!

Millstone design based on yanny7777's [Yanny's Stone Age](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stone-age-by-yanny) Millstone and EndilCrafter's [Farmer's Plus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-plus) Millstone.

 

 

Craft yourself one of three tiers of Millstones to mill and grind blocks and items into bakeable flour.

![The millstones.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc5436e2b0fa13387cb90f1fad7becba45eb864b.png)

Bread costs one-third as much as the normal recipe in flour form. There are a variety of items to choose from when it comes to milling!

![Some millable items.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c05b55fda2630752bbc3c4b15327bdbab8684dcb.png)

Different breads will have different effects, with some new ones added for fun!
(Warning: I am not responsible for any carbo-explosive deaths!)

![New bread effects.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92d0cd179970f17268f8e2425f4849556ec8efa9.png)
